{{Infobox concept
| name = Captain of The Last Horizon
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|To use [[Horizon]]'s magic, [[Varic]] had to redefine himself as the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The ritual prepared the narrator to become the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Captain of The Last Horizon]] is rumored to be [[Varic Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Captain of The Last Horizon]] challenged [[Planetary Governor]] [[Nelula Seiren]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“As the Captain of The Last Horizon, I challenge Planetary Governor Nelula Seiren.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
